title: Ability to Create Template Folders
excerpt: We organize projects into folders with a series of board and doc templates. It would be very helpful if we could create a template folder, so that when a project starts we can create a new folder with all the template bo…

posts.author: JessicaWM (Jessica Wilcock)
posts.cookedHtml: We organize projects into folders with a series of board and doc templates. It would be very helpful if we could create a template folder, so that when a project starts we can create a new folder with all the template boards and docs already there for modification/edit/input.

posts.author: Harsh (farioconsulting.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JessicaWM
Did you look into using workspace templates
While it is not exactly what you are after it may help you organize some of this.

posts.author: JessicaWM (Jessica Wilcock)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the suggestion. I did consider workspace templates; however our office could easily have twenty different projects. And 20+ workspaces feels excessive; folders are more appropriate for us. As of now we are working with a workspace for projects, marketing, general office, and resources, which feels right. I’m also not sure how archiving workspaces would work when a project is complete.

posts.author: Mcgray (Mark Gray)
posts.cookedHtml: Did you ever figure this out, I’m in the same situation. Thanks in advance

posts.author: JessicaWM (Jessica Wilcock)
posts.cookedHtml: No, I’ve just had to create new folder and individually add our template boards and docs to it.

posts.author: KaseyAdkins (Kasey Adkins)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d like this to be a thing as well. It looks like there are templates that exist in folders but I have a suspicion those templates were “grandfathered in” when the template center became a new feature. I’ve contacted Monday Support about this and it seems there isn’t a way to make this happen today.

I am fine with templates living in the Template Center by default BUT
I want the template to also live in the folder of my choosing (has the template icon that has the star-wand and the header that indicates the future changes affecting boards made from it feature at the top of the board). My screenshot (if it loads) shows that there are boards that are templates in the folder and the top template still doesn’t show the icon with the star wand.

Screenshot 2025-02-03 at 11.44.24 AM333×173 14.1 KB

posts.author: Huey (Elijah)
posts.cookedHtml: Monday please add this as a feature!

posts.author: Jakob1 (Jakob Karmann)
posts.cookedHtml:
Workspace templates could insert as folder to existing workspaces. The effect is the same. Watch the following video for an explanation:

How to use the new Workspace Templates feature
